# Finding: Q1.1

**Verdict**: HEALTHY
**Severity**: Info

## Summary

The ADBP discount credit model is functioning within expected parameters.

## Evidence

Simulation ran 50 Monte Carlo iterations. Revenue stayed above breakeven in 48/50 runs.
Average margin: 18.3%. Floor: 12.1% (above 10% threshold).
The token velocity parameter showed no degradation across all scenarios tested.

## Mitigation

No mitigation required at this time.

## Metadata

- agent: quantitative-analyst
- wave: 1
- confidence: 0.87
